We are an independent hotel management and advisory firm shaping the future of hospitality, tourism, and sustainability. With global perspective and strong local market knowledge, we partner with owners, developers, institutions, and public-sector organizations to deliver tailored strategies that drive performance, resilience, and lasting value – raising industry standards while reducing costs, improving profitability, and protecting our planet.

Featured Insights

Vietnam Hospitality and Tourism Industry Overview 2025

Vietnam’s hospitality and tourism sectors are gaining strong momentum in 2025, driven by rising international arrivals, domestic travel demand, and government-backed infrastructure. With 13.9 million international visitors by August and strong hotel performance in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam is emerging as a top investment destination in Southeast Asia. Explore market trends, growth drivers, and challenges shaping the country's tourism future.
